info.title: WizardWorldApi
info.description:
A comprehensive REST API for exploring the magical world of Harry Potter. 
This API provides access to information about elixirs, houses, ingredients, 
spells, and wizards from the wizarding world. Perfect for developers building 
Harry Potter themed applications, educational tools, or magical experiences.

get.description:
Retrieve a list of magical elixirs from the wizarding world. You can filter 
the results by various criteria such as name, difficulty level, specific 
ingredients, inventor, or manufacturer. This endpoint returns comprehensive 
information about each elixir including effects, side effects, brewing time, 
and required ingredients.

parameters.name: Name
parameters.description: Filter elixirs by name (partial match supported)

parameters.name: Difficulty
parameters.description: Filter elixirs by brewing difficulty level

parameters.name: Ingredient
parameters.description: Filter elixirs that contain a specific ingredient

parameters.name: InventorFullName
parameters.description: Filter elixirs by the full name of their inventor

parameters.name: Manufacturer
parameters.description: Filter elixirs by their manufacturer or producer

get.description:
Retrieve detailed information about a specific elixir using its unique identifier. 
This endpoint returns comprehensive data including the elixir's effects, side effects, 
brewing characteristics, required time, difficulty level, ingredients list, 
inventors, and manufacturer information.

post.description:
Submit feedback about the API, report bugs, suggest data corrections, or provide 
general suggestions for improvement. This endpoint helps maintain the quality and 
accuracy of the wizarding world data by allowing users to report issues or 
contribute suggestions.

get.description:
Retrieve information about all four Hogwarts houses: Gryffindor, Hufflepuff, 
Ravenclaw, and Slytherin. This endpoint returns detailed information about each 
house including their colors, founders, mascot animals, associated elements, 
house ghosts, common room locations, heads of house, and characteristic traits.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Query parameters for filtering houses (currently unused but reserved for future functionality)

200.description: Successfully retrieved list of Hogwarts houses

get.description:
Retrieve detailed information about a specific Hogwarts house using its unique 
identifier. This returns comprehensive data about the house including its history, 
characteristics, notable members, and associated magical properties.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Unique identifier (UUID) of the Hogwarts house

get.description:
Retrieve a list of magical ingredients used in potion brewing and spell casting. 
These ingredients range from common herbs and minerals to rare magical creature 
parts and enchanted substances. You can filter results by ingredient name to 
find specific components for your magical recipes.

parameters.name: Name
parameters.description: Filter ingredients by name (partial match supported)

200.description: Successfully retrieved list of magical ingredients

get.description:
Retrieve detailed information about a specific magical ingredient using its unique 
identifier. This provides comprehensive data about the ingredient's properties, 
uses, and magical applications in potion brewing and spell casting.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Unique identifier (UUID) of the magical ingredient

get.description:
Retrieve a comprehensive list of spells from the wizarding world. This includes 
charms, curses, hexes, jinxes, transfiguration spells, and more. You can filter 
spells by name, type, or incantation to find specific magical effects or spells 
for particular purposes.

parameters.name: Name
parameters.description: Filter spells by name (partial match supported)

parameters.name: Type
parameters.description: Filter spells by their magical type or category

parameters.name: Incantation
parameters.description: Filter spells by their spoken incantation

get.description:
Retrieve detailed information about a specific spell using its unique identifier. 
This returns comprehensive data about the spell including its incantation, effects, 
whether it can be cast verbally, spell type, light color produced, and creator 
information.

Retrieve a list of wizards and witches from the magical world. This includes 
famous characters, historical figures, and notable magical practitioners. 
You can filter results by first name, last name, or both to find specific 
magical individuals and learn about their contributions to the wizarding world.

parameters.name: FirstName
parameters.description: Filter wizards by first name (partial match supported)

parameters.name: LastName
parameters.description: Filter wizards by last name (partial match supported)

get.description:
Retrieve detailed information about a specific wizard or witch using their unique 
identifier. This returns comprehensive data about the magical person including 
their biographical information and any elixirs they have invented or contributed to.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Unique identifier (UUID) of the wizard or witch

ElixirDifficulty.description: The difficulty level required to brew an elixir, ranging from beginner-friendly to one-of-a-kind masterpieces

ElixirDto.description: Comprehensive information about a magical elixir including its properties, effects, and brewing requirements

name.description: The common name of the elixir

effect.description: The primary magical effect or purpose of the elixir
effect.example: Allows the drinker to assume the appearance of another person

sideEffects.description: Any known adverse effects or risks associated with the elixir
sideEffects.example: May cause nausea, temporary hair color changes, or complications if animal hair is used

characteristics.description: Physical characteristics of the elixir such as color, texture, smell, or taste
characteristics.example: Thick, mudlike consistency with bubbling surface; tastes revolting

time.description: Time required to brew the elixir

ingredients.description: List of magical ingredients required to brew this elixir

inventors.description: Wizards or witches who invented or significantly contributed to this elixir's development

manufacturer.description: Commercial producer or traditional source of this elixir

ElixirInventorDto.description: Information about a wizard or witch who invented or contributed to an elixir's development

firstName.description: First name of the elixir inventor

lastName.description: Last name of the elixir inventor

FeedbackType.description: Categories of feedback that users can submit to help improve the API and data quality

GetHousesQuery.description: Query parameters for filtering Hogwarts houses (reserved for future filtering capabilities)

HouseDto.description: Comprehensive information about a Hogwarts house including its history, characteristics, and notable members

houseColours.description: Official colors associated with the house

founder.description: Name of the wizard or witch who founded this house

animal.description: Mascot animal that represents the house

element.description: Classical element associated with the house

ghost.description: House ghost that resides in Hogwarts

commonRoom.description: Location of the house's common room within Hogwarts castle

heads.description: Current and former heads of house (professors responsible for the house)

traits.description: Character traits and values associated with house members

HouseHeadDto.description: Information about a professor who serves or served as head of a Hogwarts house

id.description: Unique identifier for the house head

firstName.description: First name of the house head

lastName.description: Last name of the house head

IngredientDto.description: Information about a magical ingredient used in potion brewing and spell casting

SendFeedbackCommand.description: Structure for submitting user feedback about the API or its data

feedback.description: Detailed feedback message from the user
feedback.example: The Polyjuice Potion brewing time seems incorrect based on the books

entityId.description: ID of the specific entity (elixir, spell, etc.) the feedback relates to, if applicable

SpellDto.description: Comprehensive information about a magical spell including its casting requirements and effects

incantation.description: Spoken words required to cast the spell

effect.description: Primary magical effect produced by the spell
effect.example: Forces an opponent to release whatever they are holding

canBeVerbal.description: Whether the spell can be cast with spoken incantation (true) or requires non-verbal casting (false)

creator.description: Name of the wizard or witch who created or invented the spell

SpellLight.description: Color and characteristics of light produced when the spell is cast

SpellType.description: Classification of the spell based on its magical properties and intended use

TraitDto.description: Character trait or value associated with a Hogwarts house

TraitName.description: Specific character traits and values that define the members of each Hogwarts house

Unit.description: Empty response type indicating successful completion of an operation

WizardDto.description: Information about a wizard or witch from the magical world

elixirs.description: List of elixirs that this wizard has invented or contributed to

firstName.description: First name of the wizard or witch

lastName.description: Last name of the wizard or witch

WizardElixirDto.description: Reference to an elixir associated with a specific wizard (simplified version for wizard profiles)
